description_long: This is a robust axe featuring a long, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural brown finish, designed for ergonomic grip and efficient swinging. The head of the axe is made of dark, heavy metal, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a flat poll on the opposite end for striking. The blade edge is straight and sharp, suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks, while the poll is squared off for added utility. The handle appears to be securely fitted into the eye of the axe head, likely using a traditional wedged mounting style. There are no visible decorative elements or branding, giving the tool a utilitarian appearance. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, ideal for use in urban environments such as parks, garages, or maintenance areas.
description: A sturdy axe with a curved wooden handle and a broad, dark metal blade, designed for chopping and striking tasks. The tool has a utilitarian, functional appearance with no visible branding.
description_view_0: The axe is shown with its blade facing left, highlighting the broad metal head and the ergonomic curve of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the length and curvature of the handle, with the blade edge visible and the poll facing away.
description_view_2: The handle's full curve is most apparent here, with the back of the axe head and poll in clear view.
description_view_3: The blade is angled away, showing the side profile of the axe head and the handle's attachment point.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with an oval cross-section, smooth finish, and ergonomic grip; traditional style.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad wedge-shaped steel blade with a straight edge and squared poll; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting through the eye of the axe head.
